tools.name: tnl_latest_news
tools.title: Latest TNL intelligence
tools.description: Return recent evidence-backed news intelligence, optionally filtered by category or country.

tools.name: tnl_search_news
tools.title: Search TNL intelligence
tools.description: Search TNL stories and return structured evidence, impacted assets, entities, and impact paths.

tools.name: tnl_asset_intelligence
tools.title: Asset intelligence
tools.description: Return event intelligence linked to an asset ticker. This is not a live trading-price tool.

tools.name: tnl_entity_intelligence
tools.title: Entity intelligence
tools.description: Return recent stories connected to a named TNL entity or entity id.

tools.name: tnl_impact_path
tools.title: Impact-path intelligence
tools.description: Return stories associated with a causal or market impact path.

tools.name: tnl_explain_event
tools.title: Explain an event
tools.description: Ask Ledger AI to explain a TNL event using its evidence, contradictions, affected assets, and likely impact paths.

tools.name: tnl_deep_research
tools.title: Deep research with Ledger AI
tools.description: Run a question through TNL Ledger AI research orchestration and return its answer with citations and context.

tools.name: tnl_service_status
tools.title: TNL service status
tools.description: Check API access, plan usage, market-context freshness, and current rate-limit headers.

resourceTemplates.name: tnl-story
resourceTemplates.title: TNL story
resourceTemplates.description: A TNL intelligence story by id or slug

prompts.name: tnl_daily_risk_review
prompts.title: Daily risk review
prompts.description: Analyze current TNL intelligence for portfolio-relevant risk.

prompts.name: tnl_event_due_diligence
prompts.title: Event due diligence
prompts.description: Investigate one event before it is used in a trading decision.
